mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budget (user_id, family_group_id, category_id, amount, `budget_month`, spent, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{familyGroupId}, #{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{budgetMonth}, COALESCE(#{spent}, 0), #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM budget WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY `budget_month` DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE budget SET spent = #{spent}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM budget WHERE family_group_id = #{familyGroupId} ORDER BY `budget_month` DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM budget WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_group_id = #{familyGroupId}
